description_long: This is a modern, single-story bungalow with a flat green roof and extensive use of glass and beige stone on the exterior. The structure is L-shaped, featuring large floor-to-ceiling windows along the main living areas, providing ample natural light and views of the surrounding landscaped yard. The property includes a spacious backyard with a swimming pool, patio seating, and several mature trees, as well as a driveway and garage on the front side. The rear of the bungalow opens to a private garden area with a trampoline and a shaded pergola. The overall design emphasizes open-plan living, outdoor connectivity, and minimalist landscaping. The clean lines, flat roof, and integration of outdoor amenities reflect a contemporary architectural style.
description: A modern, flat-roofed L-shaped bungalow with large glass windows, beige stone walls, and extensive landscaped outdoor spaces including a pool and garden.
description_view_0: Front view showing the driveway, garage, main entrance, and several large windows facing the street.
description_view_1: Side/rear view highlighting the backyard, trampoline, pergola, and a mix of trees and open lawn.
description_view_2: Rear view featuring the swimming pool, patio area, and wide glass doors opening to the backyard.
description_view_3: Side/front view with the driveway, garage, pool area, and a glimpse of the main entrance and front yard.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped windows along main facades
